member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthenticationResult.AccessKeyNotFound
member.summary: The supplied access key was not found.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.AdminAuthorized
member.summary: Operation authorized due to admin privileges.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitService
member.summary: Service operations are by default permitted for any authenticated user.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitBucketGlobalConfig
member.summary: Operation permitted due to bucket global configuration.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitBucketAllUsersAcl
member.summary: Operation permitted due to bucket all users access control list.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitBucketAuthUserAcl
member.summary: Operation permitted due to bucket authenticated users access control list.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitBucketUserAcl
member.summary: Operation permitted due to bucket user access control list.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitBucketOwnership
member.summary: Operation permitted due to bucket ownership.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitObjectAllUsersAcl
member.summary: Operation permitted due to object all users access control list.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitObjectAuthUserAcl
member.summary: Operation permitted due to object authenticated users access control list.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitObjectUserAcl
member.summary: Operation permitted due to object user access control list.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.AuthorizationResult.PermitObjectOwnership
member.summary: Operation permitted due to object ownership.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.BucketAcl
member.summary: Access control list entry for a bucket.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.BucketAcl.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from record creation, in UTC time.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.BucketClient
member.summary: Bucket client. All object construction, authentication, and authorization must occur prior to using bucket methods.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.BucketStatistics.Objects
member.summary: The number of objects in the bucket including all versions.

member.name: F:Less3.Classes.BucketStatistics.Bytes
member.summary: The number of bytes for all objects in the bucket.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.BucketTag.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from record creation, in UTC time.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.CleanupManager
member.summary: Cleanup manager for expired multipart uploads and other maintenance tasks.

member.name: M:Less3.Classes.CleanupManager.#ctor(Less3.Settings.SettingsBase,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,Less3.Classes.ConfigManager)
member.exception: Thrown when required parameters are null.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.CleanupManager.CleanupIntervalMs
member.summary: Cleanup interval in milliseconds. Default value is 3600000 (1 hour). Minimum value is 60000 (1 minute).

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.Credential.IsBase64
member.summary: Indicates if the secret key is base64 encoded.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.Credential.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from record creation, in UTC time.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.HashResult.MD5
member.summary: MD5 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.HashResult.SHA1
member.summary: SHA1 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.HashResult.SHA256
member.summary: SHA256 hash in lowercase hexadecimal format.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.Obj.IsFolder
member.summary: Indicates if the object is a folder, i.e. ends with '/' and has a content length of 0.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.ObjectAcl
member.summary: Access control list entry for an object.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.ObjectAcl.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from record creation, in UTC time.

member.name: M:Less3.Classes.ObjectAcl.ToString
member.summary: Create a human-readable string of the object.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.ObjectTag.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from record creation, in UTC time.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory
member.summary: Request history entry tracking an API call made to Less3.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.GUID
member.summary: GUID of the request history entry.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.HttpMethod
member.summary: HTTP method string (e.g. GET, PUT, DELETE).

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.Success
member.summary: True if the response status code is less than 400, indicating a successful request.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.RequestType
member.summary: S3 request type string (e.g. ListBuckets, GetObject, PutObject).

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.UserGUID
member.summary: GUID of the authenticated user, or null if unauthenticated.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.AccessKey
member.summary: Credential access key used for the request, or null if none provided.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.RequestContentType
member.summary: Content type of the request body.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.RequestBodyLength
member.summary: Length of the request body in bytes.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.ResponseContentType
member.summary: Content type of the response body.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.ResponseBodyLength
member.summary: Length of the response body in bytes.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.RequestBody
member.summary: Request body content, or null if empty or not captured. Large bodies may be truncated.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistory.ResponseBody
member.summary: Response body content, or null if empty or not captured. Large bodies may be truncated.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryBucket
member.summary: A single time bucket within a request history summary, containing success and failure counts for that interval.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryBucket.TimestampUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp representing the start of this time bucket.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryBucket.SuccessCount
member.summary: Number of successful requests (status code less than 400) in this time bucket.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryBucket.FailureCount
member.summary: Number of failed requests (status code 400 or greater) in this time bucket.

member.name: T:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult
member.summary: Result containing a time-series summary of request history data over a specified date range and interval.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult.Data
member.summary: Time-series data containing success and failure counts per time bucket.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult.StartUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp for the start of the summary range.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult.EndUtc
member.summary: UTC timestamp for the end of the summary range.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult.Interval
member.summary: Time interval used for bucketing (e.g. "hour", "day", "minute"). Default value is "hour".

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult.TotalSuccess
member.summary: Total number of successful requests across all time buckets.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.RequestHistorySummaryResult.TotalFailure
member.summary: Total number of failed requests across all time buckets.

member.name: P:Less3.Classes.User.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Timestamp from record creation, in UTC time.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.DatabaseDriverBase
member.summary: Abstract base class for database drivers.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.#ctor
member.summary: Database driver base class. Derived classes must initialize all interface properties in their constructors.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Boolean to indicate if it should be within a transaction.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.ExecuteQueries(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Boolean to indicate if it should be within a transaction.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.DatabaseDriverFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating database driver instances based on configuration.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseDriverFactory.Create(Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Create a database driver instance based on the supplied settings.

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.Type
member.summary: Database type. Default value is Sqlite.

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.Filename
member.summary: Filename for SQLite databases. Default value is "./less3.db".

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.Port
member.summary: Port number for network database connections. Default value is 0. Minimum value is 0. Maximum value is 65535.

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.Instance
member.summary: Instance name for SQL Server connections.

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.DatabaseName
member.summary: Database name for network database connections.

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.RequireEncryption
member.summary: Boolean indicating if encryption is required for network database connections. Default value is false.

member.name: P:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.LogQueries
member.summary: Boolean indicating if queries should be logged. Default value is false.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate for SQLite with specified filename.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate for SQL Server with hostname, port, credentials, instance, and database name.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings.#ctor(Less3.Database.DatabaseTypeEnum,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate for a specific database type with hostname, port, credentials, and database name.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.DatabaseTypeEnum
member.summary: Enumeration containing the supported database types.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketAclMethods
member.summary: Interface for bucket ACL database methods.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketAclMethods.ExistsByGroupName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a bucket group ACL exists.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketAclMethods.ExistsByUserGuid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a bucket user ACL exists.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketAclMethods.GetByBucketGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve all ACLs for a bucket.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketAclMethods.DeleteByBucketGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Delete all ACLs for a bucket.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketMethods.ExistsByName(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a bucket exists by name.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketMethods.GetByGuid(System.String)
member.returns: Bucket or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketMethods.GetByName(System.String)
member.returns: Bucket or null if not found.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketTagMethods
member.summary: Interface for bucket tag database methods.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketTagMethods.GetByBucketGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve all tags for a bucket.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IBucketTagMethods.DeleteByBucketGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Delete all tags for a bucket.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.ICredentialMethods.ExistsByGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a credential exists by GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.ICredentialMethods.GetByGuid(System.String)
member.returns: Credential or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.ICredentialMethods.GetByAccessKey(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve a credential by access key.
member.returns: Credential or null if not found.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectAclMethods
member.summary: Interface for object ACL database methods.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectAclMethods.ExistsByGroupName(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if an object group ACL exists.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectAclMethods.ExistsByUserGuid(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if an object user ACL exists.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectAclMethods.GetByObjectGuid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve ACLs for an object by object GUID and bucket GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectAclMethods.GetByBucketGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve all object ACLs for a bucket.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectAclMethods.DeleteByObjectGuidAndBucketGuid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete all ACLs for a specific object within a bucket.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectTagMethods
member.summary: Interface for object tag database methods.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectTagMethods.GetByObjectGuid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve tags for an object by object GUID and bucket GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjectTagMethods.DeleteByObjectGuid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete all tags for an object by object GUID and bucket GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjMethods.GetLatestByKey(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the latest version of an object by key within a bucket.
member.returns: Object or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjMethods.GetByKeyAndVersion(System.String,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve an object by key and version within a bucket.
member.returns: Object or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjMethods.GetByGuid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve an object by GUID within a bucket.
member.returns: Object or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjMethods.GetLatestVersion(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get the latest version number for a given key within a bucket.
member.returns: Latest version number, or 0 if none found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjMethods.Enumerate(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Enumerate objects in a bucket with pagination, optional prefix filter, and optional delete marker exclusion. Results are ordered by ID ascending.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return.
Whether to exclude objects with delete markers.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IObjMethods.GetStatistics(System.String)
member.summary: Get object count and total bytes for a bucket.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IRequestHistoryMethods
member.summary: Interface for request history database methods.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IRequestHistoryMethods.GetByGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve a request history entry by GUID.
member.returns: Request history entry or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IRequestHistoryMethods.Insert(Less3.Classes.RequestHistory)
member.summary: Insert a new request history entry.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IRequestHistoryMethods.DeleteByGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a request history entry by GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IRequestHistoryMethods.DeleteOlderThan(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Delete all request history entries older than the specified cutoff.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IRequestHistoryMethods.GetInRange(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Retrieve request history entries within a date range.
member.returns: List of matching request history entries.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUploadMethods.GetByGuid(System.String)
member.returns: Upload or null if not found.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUploadPartMethods
member.summary: Interface for upload part database methods.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUploadPartMethods.GetByUploadGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve all parts for an upload by upload GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUploadPartMethods.DeleteByUploadGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Delete all parts for an upload by upload GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUserMethods.ExistsByGuid(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a user exists by GUID.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUserMethods.ExistsByEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a user exists by email.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUserMethods.GetByGuid(System.String)
member.returns: User or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUserMethods.GetByName(System.String)
member.returns: User or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Interfaces.IUserMethods.GetByEmail(System.String)
member.returns: User or null if not found.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.MySql.MySqlDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a query against the MySQL database.
member.param: Boolean indicating whether to wrap in a transaction.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.MySql.MySqlDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQueries(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute multiple queries against the MySQL database. Queries are combined into a single statement if under the maximum statement length, otherwise executed individually.
member.param: Boolean indicating whether to wrap in a transaction.
member.returns: DataTable containing the results of the last query.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDatabaseDriver
member.summary: PostgreSQL database driver for Less3. No application-level locking is used; PostgreSQL handles concurrent access natively through connection pools.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a query against the PostgreSQL database.
member.param: Boolean to indicate if it should be within a transaction.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.PostgreSql.PostgreSqlDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQueries(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute multiple queries against the PostgreSQL database.
member.param: Boolean to indicate if it should be within a transaction.
member.returns: Data table from the last query.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a query against the SQLite database.
member.param: Boolean indicating whether to wrap in a transaction.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQueries(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute multiple queries against the SQLite database. Queries are combined into a single statement if under the maximum statement length, otherwise executed individually.
member.param: Boolean indicating whether to wrap in a transaction.
member.returns: DataTable containing the results of the last query.

member.name: T:Less3.Database.SqlServer.SqlServerDatabaseDriver
member.summary: SQL Server database driver for Less3.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.SqlServer.SqlServerDatabaseDriver.#ctor(Less3.Database.DatabaseSettings,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate the SQL Server database driver.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.SqlServer.SqlServerDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a query against the SQL Server database.
member.param: Boolean indicating whether to wrap in a transaction.

member.name: M:Less3.Database.SqlServer.SqlServerDatabaseDriver.ExecuteQueries(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute multiple queries against the SQL Server database. Queries are combined into a single statement if under the maximum statement length, otherwise executed individually.
member.param: Boolean indicating whether to wrap in a transaction.
member.returns: DataTable containing the results of the last query.

member.name: T:Less3.Helpers.AclConverter
member.summary: ACL conversion helper methods. Provides bidirectional conversion between internal ACL representations and S3 API objects.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.AclConverter.BucketAclsToPolicy(System.Collections.Generic.List{Less3.Classes.BucketAcl},Less3.Classes.User,Less3.Classes.ConfigManager,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Converts bucket ACLs to an AccessControlPolicy for API responses.
member.param: List of bucket ACLs to convert.
Logging module for warnings about misconfigured ACLs.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.returns: AccessControlPolicy containing owner information and grants.
member.exception: Thrown when owner, config, or logging is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.AclConverter.ObjectAclsToPolicy(System.Collections.Generic.List{Less3.Classes.ObjectAcl},Less3.Classes.User,Less3.Classes.ConfigManager,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Converts object ACLs to an AccessControlPolicy for API responses.
member.param: List of object ACLs to convert.
Logging module for warnings about misconfigured ACLs.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.returns: AccessControlPolicy containing owner information and grants.
member.exception: Thrown when owner, config, or logging is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.AclConverter.PolicyToBucketAcls(S3ServerLibrary.S3Objects.AccessControlPolicy,System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,Less3.Classes.User,System.String,System.String,Less3.Classes.ConfigManager,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Converts an AccessControlPolicy and request headers to a list of bucket ACLs.
member.param: AccessControlPolicy from request body. May be null.
HTTP request headers containing ACL grants. May be null.
Logging module for warnings about invalid grants.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.returns: List of BucketAcl objects ready for database insertion.
member.exception: Thrown when currentUser, config, or logging is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.AclConverter.PolicyToObjectAcls(S3ServerLibrary.S3Objects.AccessControlPolicy,System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,Less3.Classes.User,System.String,System.String,System.String,Less3.Classes.ConfigManager,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Converts an AccessControlPolicy and request headers to a list of object ACLs.
member.param: AccessControlPolicy from request body. May be null.
HTTP request headers containing ACL grants. May be null.
GUID of the bucket containing the object.
Logging module for warnings about invalid grants.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.returns: List of ObjectAcl objects ready for database insertion.
member.exception: Thrown when currentUser, config, or logging is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.AclConverter.GrantsFromHeaders(Less3.Classes.User,System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,Less3.Classes.ConfigManager)
member.summary: Extracts ACL grants from HTTP request headers. Supports canned ACLs and individual grant headers.
member.param: User making the request. Used for 'private' canned ACL.
HTTP request headers to parse. May be null.
Configuration manager for user email/GUID lookups.
member.returns: List of Grant objects parsed from headers. Empty list if no grants found.
member.exception: Thrown when user or config is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.HashHelper.ComputeHashes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compute MD5, SHA1, and SHA256 hashes of the supplied data.
member.param: Byte array containing data to hash.
member.returns: HashResult containing MD5, SHA1, and SHA256 hashes in lowercase hexadecimal format.
member.exception: Thrown when data is null.

member.name: T:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator
member.summary: Request validation helper methods. Provides common validation patterns used across API handlers.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateAndGetMetadata(S3ServerLibrary.S3Context,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that request metadata can be retrieved from the S3Context.
member.param: Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.returns: RequestMetadata object containing authentication and authorization information.
member.exception: Thrown when ctx or logging is null.
Thrown with InternalError when metadata cannot be retrieved.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateAuthorization(Less3.Classes.RequestMetadata,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the request is authorized.
member.param: Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when md or logging is null.
Thrown with AccessDenied when authorization check fails.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateBucketExists(Less3.Classes.RequestMetadata,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the bucket exists and has an associated client.
member.param: Request metadata containing bucket and bucket client references.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when md or logging is null.
Thrown with NoSuchBucket when bucket or bucket client is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateAuthentication(Less3.Classes.RequestMetadata,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that the user is authenticated.
member.param: Request metadata containing user and credential references.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when md or logging is null.
Thrown with AccessDenied when user or credential is null.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ParseVersionId(S3ServerLibrary.S3Context)
member.summary: Parses and validates the version ID from the S3 request context. Default value is 1 if no version ID is specified.
member.param: S3 request context containing version ID string.
member.returns: Parsed version ID as a long integer. Returns 1 if version ID is not specified.
member.exception: Thrown when ctx is null.
Thrown with NoSuchVersion when version ID cannot be parsed as a valid long integer.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateObjectExists(Less3.Classes.Obj,System.Int64,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that an object exists and throws appropriate exceptions based on version ID.
member.param: Object metadata. Null indicates object does not exist.
Version ID being requested. Used to determine appropriate error message.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when logging is null.
Thrown with NoSuchKey when object is null and versionId is 1. Thrown with NoSuchVersion when object is null and versionId is greater than 1.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.CheckDeleteMarker(Less3.Classes.Obj,S3ServerLibrary.S3Context)
member.summary: Checks if the object is marked as deleted and sets appropriate response headers.
member.param: Object metadata to check for delete marker.
S3 request context for setting response headers.
member.exception: Thrown when obj or ctx is null.
Thrown with NoSuchKey when object has a delete marker. Response headers will include delete marker indicator.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateUploadId(S3ServerLibrary.S3Context,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Parses and validates the upload ID from the S3 request context.
member.param: S3 request context containing upload ID string.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when ctx or logging is null.
Thrown with InvalidRequest when upload ID is null or empty.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidateUpload(Less3.Classes.Upload,System.String,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a multipart upload record exists and has not expired.
member.param: Upload record from database. Null indicates upload does not exist.
Upload ID being validated. Used for error logging.
Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when logging is null.
Thrown with NoSuchUpload when upload is null or has expired.

member.name: M:Less3.Helpers.RequestValidator.ValidatePartNumber(System.Int32,SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a part number is within valid range for multipart uploads. Valid range is 1 to 10000 inclusive.
member.param: Log header prefix for consistent log formatting.
member.exception: Thrown when logging is null.
Thrown with InvalidArgument when part number is less than 1 or greater than 10000.

member.name: T:Less3.Program
member.summary: Less3 is an S3-compatible object storage server.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.DebugSettings.Authentication
member.summary: Enable or disable debugging of authentication logic.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.DebugSettings.S3Requests
member.summary: Enable or disable debugging of S3 request parsing.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.DebugSettings.Exceptions
member.summary: Enable or disable debugging of exceptions.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.SyslogServerIp
member.summary: IP address or hostname of the syslog server.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.LogHttpRequests
member.summary: Enable or disable logging of HTTP requests.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.LogS3Requests
member.summary: Enable or disable logging of S3 requests.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.LogExceptions
member.summary: Enable or disable logging of exceptions.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.LogSignatureValidation
member.summary: Enable or disable logging of signature validation.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.ConsoleLogging
member.summary: Enable or disable logging to the console.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.DiskLogging
member.summary: Enable or disable logging to disk.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.LoggingSettings.DiskDirectory
member.summary: Directory on disk to write log files.

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.SettingsBase.BaseDomain
member.summary: Base domain, if using virtual hosted-style URLs, e.g. "localhost".

member.name: P:Less3.Settings.SettingsBase.HeaderApiKey
member.summary: API key header for admin API requests.

member.name: P:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.StreamBufferSize
member.summary: Buffer size to use while reading file streams.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Verify the existence of an object by key.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.ReadStream(System.String)
member.summary: Read an object. Your code must close the stream when complete.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.ReadRange(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Read a specific number of bytes from a specific location in an object.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.ReadRangeAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Read a specific number of bytes asynchronously from a specific location in an object.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.ReadRangeStream(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Read a specific number of bytes from a specific location in an object. Your code must close the stream when complete.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.ReadRangeStreamAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Read a specific number of bytes asynchronously from a specific location in an object. Your code must close the stream when complete.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.Write(System.String,System.Int64,System.IO.Stream)
member.param: Number of bytes to read from the stream.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.DiskStorageDriver.WriteAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.IO.Stream)
member.param: Number of bytes to read from the stream.

member.name: T:Less3.Storage.ObjectStream
member.summary: Stream of data for an object. Implements IDisposable to ensure the underlying data stream is properly released.

member.name: M:Less3.Storage.ObjectStream.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of the object stream and release the underlying data stream.

member.name: T:Less3.Storage.StorageDriverBase
member.summary: Less3 storage driver base abstract class; allows developers to build their own storage providers for Less3.
